branches.name: IT & Engineering
branches.description: NUS Computing and Engineering are globally ranked in the top 10. The faculty is a leader in AI, cybersecurity, and quantum computing, with strong government and industry partnerships.

branches.name: Business
branches.description: NUS Business School is a premier institution in Asia, offering a wide array of programs with a focus on leadership in the digital age.

branches.name: Medicine
branches.description: Yong Loo Lin School of Medicine is the oldest and most prestigious medical school in Singapore, focused on clinical excellence and biomedical research.

branches.name: Law
branches.description: NUS Law is widely considered the top law school in Asia, known for its expertise in international commercial law and arbitration.

branches.name: Science
branches.description: The Faculty of Science at NUS is a multi-disciplinary research powerhouse covering chemistry, physics, and life sciences.

branches.name: Engineering
branches.description: NTU Engineering is one of the world's largest, ranked within the top 5 globally for Materials Science and Engineering excellence.

branches.name: Business
branches.description: Nanyang Business School is the first in Singapore and among the few globally to be accredited by both EQUIS and AACSB.

branches.name: Medicine
branches.description: Lee Kong Chian School of Medicine is a joint school between NTU and Imperial College London, offering world-class medical training.

branches.name: Science
branches.description: Focusing on interdisciplinary science, sustainability, and environmental research within the Nanyang environment.

branches.name: Humanities
branches.description: Strong programs in communication, media, and digital humanities designed for the global Asian hub.

branches.name: Business
branches.description: Lee Kong Chian School of Business is SMU's flagship, known for its interactive pedagogy and high career outcomes in the finance industry.

branches.name: Law
branches.description: Yong Pung How School of Law is recognized for its excellence in commercial law and legal innovation.

branches.name: Economics
branches.description: A research-focused economics faculty with strong ties to policy-making and global financial hub research.

branches.name: Accountancy
branches.description: The first school in Singapore to offer an accountancy degree, maintaining top-tier industry relations.

branches.name: Social Sciences
branches.description: Multidisciplinary programs focusing on psychology, sociology, and political science in an urban context.

name: Singapore University of Technology and Design (SUTD)

branches.name: Engineering Product Development
branches.description: EPD focuses on the design and development of products for the global market, integrating mechanical and electrical engineering.

branches.name: Architecture
branches.description: Architecture and Sustainable Design (ASD) focuses on the intersection of architecture, urbanism, and environmental conservation.

branches.name: IT
branches.description: Information Systems Technology and Design (ISTD) focuses on software systems and digital security innovation.

branches.name: Engineering Systems
branches.description: ESD focuses on the design of large-scale systems such as transport, logistics, and energy grids.

branches.name: DMan
branches.description: Design and Artificial Intelligence (DAI) is SUTD's newest branch, focusing on AI-driven industrial design.

branches.name: MBA
branches.description: INSEAD's MBA program is consistently ranked among the best in the world, known for its extreme international diversity and accelerated 1-year track.

branches.name: Finance
branches.description: Executive Master in Finance focuses on advanced financial strategy and global capital markets.

branches.name: Management
branches.description: The Master in Management (MIM) is for young professionals seeking a high-speed entry into global strategy roles.

branches.name: Leadership
branches.description: Executive leadership programs designed for C-suite professionals and entrepreneurs in Asia.

branches.name: Strategy
branches.description: Focusing on corporate governance and strategic innovation in the Asian market.
